# TYM Agency — Custom Web Development, SEO & Internet Marketing in Trichy, Tamil Nadu
> TYM Agency engineers high-performance custom React websites, algorithmic local SEO systems, Google Maps ranking, and internet marketing strategies for businesses in Trichy (Tiruchirappalli), Madurai, and across Tamil Nadu. Every project is hand-coded — no templates, no page builders, no WordPress.

## About
- [About TYM Agency](https://theyouthmint.com/our-story): Our story — a web development and SEO agency founded in Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, built to fund a mission through technical excellence.
- [Our Team](https://theyouthmint.com/team): Meet the web developers, systems engineers, and SEO specialists behind TYM Agency in Trichy.

## Services
- [Web Development Services](https://theyouthmint.com/services): Custom React web development, headless e-commerce, and high-performance website engineering in Trichy, Tamil Nadu.
- [Local SEO & Google Maps Ranking](https://theyouthmint.com/services): Google Business Profile optimization, citation audits, and Google Maps proximity ranking for Trichy and Tamil Nadu businesses.
- [Internet Marketing](https://theyouthmint.com/services): Comprehensive digital marketing strategies including Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) for AI search visibility.
- [Generative Engine Optimization](https://theyouthmint.com/services): GEO — structured entity graphs and llms.txt optimization to ensure your brand is recommended by ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity.

## Case Studies
- [Sabesh Fashions Case Study](https://theyouthmint.com/case-study): How we took a Madurai fancy dress rental from zero digital visibility to #1 on Google Maps in 30 days — a local SEO case study from Trichy.

## Portfolio
- [Web Development Portfolio](https://theyouthmint.com/portfolio): 13 live custom React websites, e-commerce stores, and local SEO ranking systems deployed by TYM Agency.
